persona.name: Nour
persona.greeting: Welcome to Gulf Pharma Connect 2026. I am Nour, your AI concierge. How can I help you today?

venue.name: Conrad Dubai
venue.registration_desk: Grand Foyer, ground floor — open from 07:30 Day 1 and 08:00 Day 2
venue.parking: Valet at the main hotel entrance, complimentary for delegates

sessions.title: Panel: Market Access in the GCC

transport.airport_shuttle: Shuttle from Dubai International Terminals 1 & 3 at 06:00, 08:00, and 10:00 on Day 1. Return at 07:00 on Day 2. Contact the transport desk in the Foyer for changes.
transport.hotel_shuttle: Every 30 minutes between Conrad Dubai and DIFC Metro station.
transport.taxi_note: Hotel concierge can arrange taxis. Estimated fare to DXB airport is AED 80–100.

meals.note: All dietary options are labelled at every station. Notify the registration desk for severe allergies.

drugs.approved_indication: Cardivex is approved for the management of primary hypercholesterolaemia and mixed dyslipidaemia in adult patients.
key_facts: Once-daily oral tablet available in 20 mg, 40 mg, and 80 mg strengths.
Extended-release formulation designed for consistent 24-hour lipid control.
Registered and available in UAE, KSA, Egypt, and Kuwait.
Featured in the Day 1 symposium: Oncology Pipeline Updates — cardiovascular co-morbidities session.

faqs.question: What is Cardivex used for?
faqs.answer: Cardivex is approved for the management of elevated cholesterol and mixed lipid disorders in adult patients. For clinical details, please speak to a medical representative.

faqs.question: Which countries is Cardivex available in?
faqs.answer: Cardivex is currently registered and available in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and Kuwait.

faqs.question: What strengths does Cardivex come in?
faqs.answer: Cardivex is available as a once-daily oral tablet in 20 mg, 40 mg, and 80 mg strengths.

faqs.question: Who is presenting Cardivex data at this event?
faqs.answer: Cardivex data is being discussed in the Day 1 symposium on cardiovascular co-morbidities. Dr. Rania Mostafa from Pfizer is presenting in the same session.

faqs.question: Where do I collect my badge?
faqs.answer: Registration desk in the Grand Foyer, ground floor — open from 07:30 on Day 1 and 08:00 on Day 2.

faqs.question: Is there a dress code?
faqs.answer: Business professional is recommended. The gala dinner on Day 1 evening is black-tie optional.

faqs.question: Can I get a certificate of attendance?
faqs.answer: Yes — email certificates are issued within 5 business days. Request at the registration desk.

faqs.question: Are there CPD credits?
faqs.answer: Yes — 8 CPD credits over two days. Confirm your attendance at the registration desk each day.

faqs.question: Where can I access the presentations after the event?
faqs.answer: Slides shared with consent will be emailed to all registered delegates within 2 weeks.
